channel.title: Review of Middle East Economics and Finance
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Review of Middle East Economics and Finance

item.description: Article by Yasmin Mamdouh Abdel Hameed DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/rmeef-2024-frontmatter3

item.title: Exploring the Relationship Between ESG Performance and Dividend Policy in MENAT Region: The Role of Audit Quality
